summary_one_line: A well-formed cmap subtable whose format field equals a non-zero supported value (4/13/14), routing the switch away from case 0.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A structurally valid OpenType cmap table (sfnt header + 'cmap' tag + EncodingRecord) whose selected subtable format field holds a non-zero supported value (4, 13, or 14) so the switch on u.format dispatches to a case other than 0, taking the blocked false side of case 0.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner seeds carry the intact sfnt/'cmap' header (offset 0x0c bytes 63 6d 61 70 = 'cmap') and a structured subtable whose format selector resolves to format 4/13 (W hits OT::CmapSubtableFormat4 and Format13 get_glyph paths that L never reaches); the per-role overlay shows W hitting case 4/13/14 arms while case 0 is the false branch.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser seeds are short, unstructured byte blobs (13-62 bytes) lacking the 'cmap' header at offset 0x0c; their parse falls into format 0 (the True side of case 0 with T=10 F=0), so they never satisfy the non-zero-format condition and stay blocked.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog's I2SRandReplace substitutes intercepted CMP operands (the format-discriminator constant and the 'cmap'/sfnt magic bytes) directly into the input, letting it construct the exact header/format bytes needed to pass the format-equality dispatch; plain value_profile has only CMP_MAP distance feedback and no I2S substitution mutator, so it cannot synthesize the multi-byte structured header.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the false branch of a switch on u.format, case 0 of CmapSubtable::collect_unicodes.
The winner takes case 4/13/14 arms while the loser stays on case 0.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
[L]  1366      case  0: u.format0 .collect_unicodes (out); return; <-- BLOCKER
[W]  1367      case  4: u.format4 .collect_unicodes (out); return;

evidence_trail.claim: Per-role branch counts confirm the winner takes case 0 false (F=5) and the loser takes case 0 true (T=10 F=0).
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L1366  T=0 F=5  T=10 F=0  case  0: u.format0 .collect_unicodes (out); return;  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: Winner seeds contain the intact 'cmap' header at offset 0x0c.
Loser seeds are short unstructured blobs lacking the cmap header.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: Seed 2 (id=0003cbd2b6f5fff8, size=13 bytes, fuzzer=value_profile, trial=1, discovered_at=102s, mutation_op=BitFlipMutator,BytesDeleteMutator,WordAddMutator):

evidence_trail.claim: The winner reaches Format13 get_glyph paths the loser never executes.
value_profile_cmplog carries the I2SRandReplace mutator while value_profile does not.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of the havoc/token stack.
The decisive pair delta is I2S between vpc (winner) and vp (loser).

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5408 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 2cd766ba50495565` and observed an I2S-floor row (mutation_op = -) at depth 43 of the 44-level ancestor chain; the tool reports '1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 43', the dash-row floor signal characteristic of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in vpc under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where value_profile alone resolves the non-zero-format dispatch at parity with value_profile_cmplog, showing CMP_MAP distance feedback suffices to construct the format selector without I2S substitution.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact byte offset of the format-selector field is inferred from the structured-vs-unstructured seed contrast rather than pinned to a single concentrated BYTE DIFF offset carrying the format value.
